raw_consumer_statement: I ordered XXXX statues that were XXXX dimensional on what was claimed on the sales page with photos included to be on a sturdy base. What I received were XXXX flat pieces of plastic with the statue printed on them only. These are flat XXXX dimensional objects are completely different than what they have in their photos and in the description. I tried to return the product with the seller and asked them to send me a return label and they refused. I still have the product and have told people that I will return it to the vendor, but I went to the XXXX XXXX and was told that it would be over {$30.00} to ship it back to XXXX. Because this company completely scammed me, I should not have to be out {$30.00} to return it and will be glad to return it to the vendor with a return shipping label. When I filed my dispute with Citibank, there was nowhere for me to even upload any photos so they dont even know the product that I received nor what was advertised. They simply closed the dispute without even asking me for a follow up. I did not even have a chance to respond. They talked to the merchant and immediately denied my claim, and there was not even an option for me to send in the photos or to dispute their response. I will still return the product once I get a return label, but when you view the photos of what they advertised and the absolute scam junk that they sent to me, you will agree that I should not have to be out over {$30.00} to ship an item back to XXXX that was completely a scam and not what was advertised. This is how this conpany operates- they send a completely different item and know people wont pay to send it back to them ( even though it is NOT what I bought ) so they keep the money and continue scamming more people. The fact that Citibank did not even allow me to upload photos nor give me a chance to respond or file, a rebuttal is completely unacceptable. Anybody who looks at the photos of the item and description on their website and the absolute piece of junk that they sent to me, which is completely not what was advertised or pictured, would agree that I have been scammed. Citibank just closed my dispute and is allowing this scammer company to keep my money. if you read the description, it also says that it is in XXXX clear glass. I received a flat piece of plastic with the item printed on it. The fact that Citibank does not even allow me to upload photos or try to make my case, shows me that Citibank does not value their customers nor care about these international scammers.
